title: HarmlessResource
body:
# NOTIFICATIONS: A JOKE! A JOKE! JUST ＡＪＯＫＥ！

# Harmless Resourcepack

Afraid of your kids or baby went bad when they playing this game? Don't worry about it! This resourcepack will protect your kids very well.   
We remove the very scared things in this game. Instead we add another less sharp things so that protect your kids very well.
You can click the Gallery word to see what we changed.   

The resourcepack's "first" name is the target age. You can download the pack which fit your kids.

This pack is in very early stage. What I recommend is keep your kids from this game.

# Truth

It was a simple day when I'm playing 1.20. Everything was a fine day before I met some skeletons.  
So I start the fighting with them when my 3-year-old cousin came in without my permission.   
He came in a while. And then, he started makin' a noise sounds like air defense alert that forced me stop.(In actually,he was crying at that moment.)   
When I asking him what's going on, my aunt rushed in and give me a powerful slap in the face.  
It was very hurt, not only my face, but also the feelin' of my aunt.  
Even if I tried over n over again to explained the reason of impossibility not to appear the skeletons, she still required me to make sure that no skeleton will appear in my screen that make sure her "sweety" (He ain't sweet at all, he bring me A LOT OF troubles for me.😡😓) won't be scared again. In fact, what I do for she is a efficient-less things.  
So this pack come out.
